sections.paragraph:
- Original: πάρειμι

- Transliteration: Pareimi

- Phonetic: par'-i-mee

- Definition:

1. to be by, be at hand, to have arrived, to be present

2. to be ready, in store, at command

- Origin: from G3844 and G1510 (including its various forms)

- TDNT entry: 19:18,8

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3844 and G1510 (including its various forms); to be near that is at hand; neuter present participle (singular) time being or (plural) property: - come X have be here + lack (be here) present.
